_comment: Tests Northern Physio's mandatory billing question for standard physio, Pelvic Floor qualifier before location gate, and service-location mismatch block for Exercise Physiology at Plenty Road.

scenarios.name: Standard physio — must ask private or insurance before routing

history.content: I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Are you making a private booking, or claiming through an insurance or health fund provider?' as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent asks location first, routes to confirm_service, or asks new/existing before the billing question.

scenarios.name: Pelvic floor — must ask initial or follow-up before location

history.content: I need to book a pelvic floor appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Is this an initial consultation or a follow-up?' as a spoken-only turn before asking any location question. FAIL if agent asks location before the qualifier, routes directly to confirm_service, or asks the billing question.

scenarios.name: Exercise Physiology at Plenty Road — mismatch block fires

history.content: I'd like to book an exercise physiology appointment.
Which location would you like to come to? We have South Morang, or two locations in Epping -- Group One Medical on Edgars Road, or O'Herns Road Medical Centre on Manor House Drive.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks the mismatch response ('That service isn't available at Plenty Road. It is available at our O'Herns Road location in Epping...') and offers the alternative location. FAIL if agent calls confirm_service with Plenty Road as the business location for Exercise Physiology.
